body:
APPROVE
Clean implementation of CONTRACT-003 ownership move. The service now owns session.start (at openSessionLog) and session.end (via finalizeAndEmit + idempotent writeEnd), with a defer-based safety net for unexpected exits. CLI adapter deleted as required, and SelectedRoute/ResolvedModelRef were threaded through the public request type so attribution is preserved without internal-package coupling.
